function.name: autosurvey
function.description: Run the AutoSurvey research workflow as a single high-level tool. Use this only when the user explicitly asks for a new investigation, fresh web-backed research, source collection, literature survey, or compact research brief. Do not use this for ordinary conversation, direct explanations, code/design advice, identity/capability questions, current date/time questions, or questions that should be answered from already indexed local documents with rag_search. In chat mode this tool is intentionally capped to at most 5 collected documents.

request.description: Standalone research request to investigate. Preserve the user's topic, scope, and explicit site constraints such as site:https://example.com. Do not add arXiv, definition, paper, conference, or current-year modifiers unless the user asked for those.

max_docs.description: Maximum number of documents to collect for this chat-triggered survey. Values above 5 are capped to 5 by the tool.

force_plan.description: Whether to force rebuilding the research plan instead of reusing any saved plan. Defaults to true for chat-triggered surveys.

overwrite_summaries.description: Whether to overwrite existing document summaries generated in the same output directory. Defaults to false.
